label: Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding

node.label: Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding
node.definition: Speculative and assisted decoding propose multiple future tokens with a cheaper process and verify them in parallel with the target model.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding is to connect Model servers & inference runtimes, Autoregressive decoding to downstream capabilities including Large language models, Conversational assistants & chatbots.
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Model servers & inference runtimes, Autoregressive decoding.

dependencies.rationale: Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding turns Model servers & inference runtimes into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding turns Autoregressive decoding into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding turns Decoder-only causal transformers into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.

sentence_units.text: Speculative and assisted decoding propose multiple future tokens with a cheaper process and verify them in parallel with the target model.

The role of Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding is to connect Model servers & inference runtimes, Autoregressive decoding to downstream capabilities including Large language models, Conversational assistants & chatbots.

Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Model servers & inference runtimes, Autoregressive decoding.
